topics.title: Start here
topics.answer: Start with the command center. It asks who you are, what you need, then routes you to the best product console, proof lab, contract page, or receipt object.

topics.title: Know when AI work is actually done
topics.answer: GoalOS Signoff is the acceptance layer for AI work: define the brief, submit work and evidence, check the proof, capture human review, and issue a Mission Receipt.

topics.title: Mission 001 reproducibility packet
topics.answer: Mission 001 is the benchmark-ready proof packet with mission contract, environment, baselines, proof bundle, replay log, ledgers, validator report, scoreboard, and claims matrix.

topics.title: Browser beta
topics.answer: The browser beta is the safest product tour: inspect the proof cycle without uploads, wallets, payments, analytics, or value movement.

topics.title: All public labs v22–v40
topics.answer: The public demo hub lists the full v22–v40 suite: core proof labs, blockchain credibility, RSI/ASI governance, product-first Signoff, 48-contract atlas, and the live answer router.

topics.title: AGIALPHA 48-contract atlas
topics.answer: The contract atlas explains the GoalOS-created Ethereum Mainnet trust rails. The public release records 48 GoalOS-created contracts and 48 / 48 verified Etherscan source verification, without production activation or user-fund authorization.

topics.title: Signoff Basic
topics.answer: Signoff Basic is the first product: no wallet, no chain transaction, no token requirement; it produces a protocol-compatible Evidence Docket and Mission Receipt.

topics.title: Signoff Verified
topics.answer: Signoff Verified adds anchored hashes, proof cards, credentials, replay references, and a stronger public verification record after authorization.

topics.title: Signoff Secured
topics.answer: Signoff Secured adds accountable review: reviewer/evaluator bonds, challenge windows, reputation, claim boundaries, falsification, and appeal rails after audit gates.

topics.title: Signoff & Settle
topics.answer: Signoff & Settle is the advanced tier where accepted work can trigger bounded rewards, dispute handling, treasury routing, and settlement rails only after production authorization.

topics.title: From Loop to RSI
topics.answer: The RSI arc upgrades proof-gated work into governed invention: deterministic pipeline, schema-bound artifacts, baseline comparison, Move-37 dossiers, and mechanical gates.
keywords: target emit filter atlas test plan eval insert promote

topics.title: ASI Mission Simulator
topics.answer: The v35 ASI Mission Simulator lets visitors run the Loop → RSI → ASI path through proof gates, dossiers, council review, rollback, and synthetic receipt logic.

topics.title: Autonomous AI Concierge
topics.answer: v40 is the concierge layer: ask a question, receive a grounded answer, see the recommended route, and open the right page or contract object with a safe countdown.

topics.title: Start here
topics.answer: Start with the command center. It asks who you are, explains the simplest next step, and routes you to the right proof lab or product console.

topics.title: GoalOS Signoff
topics.answer: GoalOS Signoff is the customer-facing product: define done, submit evidence, check completeness, obtain human approval, and issue a Mission Receipt.
keywords: know when ai work is done

topics.title: AI Research & Strategy Signoff
topics.answer: v37 is the product-first console. It shows the five-step experience: Create → Submit → Check → Review → Receipt.

topics.title: Mission 001
topics.answer: Mission 001 is the benchmark-ready reproducibility packet: mission contract, environment, baselines, proof bundle, replay log, ledgers, validator report, scoreboard, and claims matrix.

topics.title: All public labs
topics.answer: Open the public lab catalog to see the full GoalOS arc: proof loop, blockchain credibility, Proof Before Settlement, RSI/ASI governance, product-first Signoff, and the 48-contract atlas.

topics.title: 48 Mainnet contract atlas
topics.answer: The 48-contract atlas explains the GoalOS-created Ethereum Mainnet rails. The release records 48 GoalOS-created contracts, 48 / 48 verified Etherscan source verification, and a configured but not production-activated boundary.

topics.title: Individual contract pages
topics.answer: Open the contract index to inspect every GoalOS-created Mainnet contract, grouped by family, role, Signoff tier, proof stage, address, and Etherscan link.

topics.title: $AGIALPHA role
topics.answer: $AGIALPHA is not the Signoff product. It is the optional economic security and settlement asset: fees, bonds, reviewer stakes, challenge stakes, work rewards, and protocol revenue where authorized.

topics.title: Production boundary
topics.answer: The public site is educational and read-only. It does not authorize user funds, production activation, token approvals, or live settlement. The Mainnet release is configured and verified, not a public-fund activation.

topics.title: Proof Before Settlement
topics.answer: Proof Before Settlement formalizes the core standard: blockchain proves the transaction; GoalOS proves the work. Evidence, validation, receipt, and claim boundaries come before settlement readiness.

topics.title: Ask GoalOS Navigator
topics.answer: v39 adds the autonomous site navigator: ask a question, receive a browser-local answer, and get routed to the best page or proof object.

topics.title: Capital, vaults & treasury
topics.answer: Capital, vaults & treasury contains 6 GoalOS-created Mainnet contracts: CommercializationPerformanceVault, ProofRewardsVault, LiquidityVault, SecurityVault, CommunityVault, TreasuryRouter. Open the atlas to filter the full family and inspect individual contract pages.

topics.title: Core proof, work & protocol registries
topics.answer: Core proof, work & protocol registries contains 13 GoalOS-created Mainnet contracts: ProofSeedRegistry, LegacyAGIJobManagerRegistry, ReputationRegistry, ReferralRegistry, ProofCardRegistry, ProofCredentialRegistry, JobRegistry, JobClaimBondManager…. Open the atlas to filter the full family and inspect individual contract pages.

topics.title: Dispute, participation & credential governance
topics.answer: Dispute, participation & credential governance contains 5 GoalOS-created Mainnet contracts: DisputeRegistry, AppealRegistry, SponsorRegistry, BuilderProfileRegistry, CredentialRevocationRegistry. Open the atlas to filter the full family and inspect individual contract pages.

topics.title: AEP execution, evidence & rollout architecture
topics.answer: AEP execution, evidence & rollout architecture contains 15 GoalOS-created Mainnet contracts: AEPAgentRegistry, AEPArtifactRegistry, AEPGoalOSCommitRegistry, AEPRunCommitmentRegistry, AEPProofLedger, AEPEvalRegistry, AEPAttestationRegistry, AEPSelectionGate…. Open the atlas to filter the full family and inspect individual contract pages.

topics.title: Institutional assurance, staking & accountability
topics.answer: Institutional assurance, staking & accountability contains 9 GoalOS-created Mainnet contracts: AEPConformanceRegistry, AEPClaimBoundaryRegistry, AEPReplayRegistry, AEPCommitRevealValidationRegistry, AEPEvaluatorStakingRegistry, AEPSlashingCourt, AEPRewardVault, AEPChronicleRegistry…. Open the atlas to filter the full family and inspect individual contract pages.

topics.title: CommercializationPerformanceVault
topics.answer: CommercializationPerformanceVault is a Capital, vaults & treasury rail for Commercialization reserve. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Settle layer and supports Settle. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Receives and tracks commercialization-performance capital as a vault rail.

topics.title: ProofRewardsVault
topics.answer: ProofRewardsVault is a Capital, vaults & treasury rail for Proof reward reserve. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Settle layer and supports Settle. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Holds reward capital for proof work, reviewers, and accepted work flows.

topics.title: LiquidityVault
topics.answer: LiquidityVault is a Capital, vaults & treasury rail for Liquidity reserve. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Settle layer and supports Protocol support. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Separates liquidity support from proof, security, and community vaults.

topics.title: SecurityVault
topics.answer: SecurityVault is a Capital, vaults & treasury rail for Security reserve. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Secured layer and supports Protocol support. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Sets aside funds for security and resilience-related protocol obligations.

topics.title: CommunityVault
topics.answer: CommunityVault is a Capital, vaults & treasury rail for Community reserve. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Settle layer and supports Protocol support. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Supports ecosystem/community allocations without mixing with proof settlement rails.

topics.title: ProofSeedRegistry
topics.answer: ProofSeedRegistry is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Proof seed registry. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Verified layer and supports Protocol support. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Records seed-level proof metadata used to initialize or identify proof objects.

topics.title: LegacyAGIJobManagerRegistry
topics.answer: LegacyAGIJobManagerRegistry is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Legacy job bridge. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Verified layer and supports Protocol support. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Bridges legacy AGIJobManager lifecycle references into the GoalOS-native regime.

topics.title: ReputationRegistry
topics.answer: ReputationRegistry is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Reputation memory. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Settle layer and supports Remember. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Records reputation updates arising from accepted work, reviewer history, and disputes.

topics.title: ReferralRegistry
topics.answer: ReferralRegistry is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Attribution rail. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Verified layer and supports Protocol support. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Records referral and attribution links for ecosystem growth or contribution tracking.

topics.title: ProofCardRegistry
topics.answer: ProofCardRegistry is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Proof card issuance. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Verified layer and supports Accept. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Mints or records proof-card style objects after successful review/signoff.

topics.title: ProofCredentialRegistry
topics.answer: ProofCredentialRegistry is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Credential issuance. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Verified layer and supports Accept. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Records credentials linked to proof acceptance and reviewer/worker identity.

topics.title: JobRegistry
topics.answer: JobRegistry is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Job + reward escrow logic. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Settle layer and supports Create brief, Settle. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Defines bounded jobs, reward terms, liability constraints, and release mechanics.

topics.title: JobClaimBondManager
topics.answer: JobClaimBondManager is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Job claim bonds. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Secured layer and supports Protocol support. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Handles bonds associated with job claims and claimant accountability.

topics.title: PremiumAccessRegistry
topics.answer: PremiumAccessRegistry is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Access tier registry. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Verified layer and supports Protocol support. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Tracks premium/protocol access state without making public demos require an account.

topics.title: ProofSubmissionRegistry
topics.answer: ProofSubmissionRegistry is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Proof submission router. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Settle layer and supports Accept. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.
keywords: Connects submitted proof to review, approval, credential issuance, and reward release paths.

topics.title: ReviewerBondRegistry

keywords: Models reviewer bonds, approvals, challenge windows, and slashing conditions.

topics.title: TreasuryRouter

topics.answer: ProtocolConfigRegistry is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Protocol configuration. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Verified layer and supports Create brief. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.

topics.title: LaunchGateRegistry
topics.answer: LaunchGateRegistry is a Core proof, work & protocol registries rail for Launch gating. In Signoff, it belongs mainly to the Verified layer and supports Create brief. Open its page for address, Etherscan link, role, tier, and public-safe boundary.

topics.title: AppealRegistry

topics.title: SponsorRegistry

topics.title: BuilderProfileRegistry
